message:
chore(audit): record batches 420-422 (SSE fix, security audit, IO/stream)

Batch 420: SSE data field injection (1 FIXED — bare \r bypassed data:
field splitting). HTTP codec smuggling audit (SOUND).
Batch 421: WebSocket security (handshake, client, server), TLS (stream,
acceptor), web middleware/extract/router, DNS, QUIC, plan/record modules
— 21 files, all SOUND.
Batch 422: io_uring file ops, async copy, stream combinators (peekable,
zip, chain, scan), select, bulkhead, concurrency_limit, signal, compress,
h1/client — 11 files, all SOUND.

Session: 34 bugs fixed, 170+ files audited, ~220K+ lines.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
